reasoning: A hybrid booking platform and admin dashboard demands extreme clarity, trust, and a modern professional aesthetic. We use stark whites, sharp greys, and a commanding primary blue to signify authority and reliability, keeping the interface uncluttered for complex tasks like seat selection and schedule management.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Dense bento grids for the dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_layout: Asymmetrical bento grids with overlapping elements. Large gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_layout: Control Room Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense spacing (gap-4 or gap-6), h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and forms. Center-align only high-impact hero headings.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-card), 1px subtle border (border-border), no default shadow. Hover: slight lift and shadow-lg.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Sharp corners or max 8px radius. Primary buttons use the brand blue with a subtle hover opacity shift.

components_strategy.marketing: Pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Shadcn customized for interactive logic.
components_strategy.dashboard: Shadcn UI (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs). Cardless or very subtle bordered containers.
components_strategy.forms: Strict Shadcn input, select, and checkbox use. Never native.
components_strategy.seat_selection_3d: React Three Fiber with Drei. State managed via React, 60fps animations via useFrame. Tailwind overlays for UI.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts for the admin dashboard analytics.

motion_and_interactions.splash_screen: Framer Motion for a dramatic logo reveal. Use asymmetrical timing (easeOut 0.8s).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-transform 0.2s ease, transition-opacity 0.2s ease. No 'all' transitions.

hero_background.description: Futuristic sleek luxury bus on highway at sunset. Use as hero background on the landing page.

seat_selection_3d_fallback.description: 3D isometric bus interior. Use as a background or placeholder for the 3D seat selection component.

admin_dashboard_bg.description: Abstract topographical map texture. Use subtly in admin login or dashboard header.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images uses proper overlays (e.g., bg-black/40) or text-shadow.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='search-bus-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the Splash Screen using Framer Motion for a sleek 'BUS YATRA' reveal before routing to login/home.

Implement the 3D Seat Selection using @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. If 3D rendering is too complex for the timeframe, use the provided isometric 3D image as a rich background and layer a 2D interactive grid over it.
Use Manrope for body text to ensure numbers (times, prices, dates) align beautifully.
Ensure the Admin Dashboard follows the 'Control Room Grid' pattern with compact spacing.
All forms MUST use customized Shadcn UI components.
The Hero Section must use the 'hero_background' image with a subtle gradient overlay to ensure the H1 text is readable.
